apps.name: OmniCard
apps.localizedDescription: My first app on AltStore! OmniCard is a Card database directly on your iPhone or iPad, so you can bring all your cards on the go wherever you like without the fear of losing them. As of now the backup feature only backups ONLY the cards name, username and sets, in a future update we will add photos backup too. Only available in italian, English language coming soon!
